output.setting: The sunken laboratory of a corrupted research vessel

pickup.name: Caustic Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases acid damage potency

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Cultist unlocks the door to the Storage Bay

pickup.name: Frozen Ether Vial
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies and lowers boss defense

encounters.trigger: The Scuttler's death triggers the emergency containment breach alarm

pickup.name: Ancient Sealant
pickup.effect: Prevents the boss from summoning minions

encounters.trigger: Vanquishing the Void Horror opens the heavy bulkhead to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: The Leviathan's Eye
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Frozen Ether Vial into the eye to shatter its outer shell

output.objective: Escape the sinking laboratory before the pressure hull collapses

output.setting: An abandoned deep-sea oil rig infested with shadow-twisted mutations

enemy.name: Oil-slick Stalker
enemy.weakness: Direct blasts from the Eternal Ember Staff

encounters.hazard: Gaseous pockets that explode upon contact with fire

pickup.name: Freezing Cryo-Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily slows enemy movement and hardens their skin

encounters.trigger: Burning the stalker triggers a pressure valve, flooding the lower vents where the second creature hides

enemy.name: Corroded Slasher
enemy.weakness: Brittle from the Freezing Cryo-Canister effect

encounters.hazard: Slippery, oil-coated floors that cause stumbling

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the command bridge bulkhead

encounters.trigger: Slaying the slasher causes its acidic blood to melt the heavy iron door leading to the reactor core

enemy.name: Radiated Horror
enemy.weakness: Intense heat combined with the Ancient Relic Key's resonance

encounters.hazard: High radiation zone that drains player health over time

pickup.name: Abyssal Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Negates the radiation damage from the boss arena

encounters.trigger: The death of the Horror triggers the final lockdown release, opening the way to the command bridge

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep
boss.weakness: Must be weakened by the Abyssal Stabilizer before fire damage can pierce its hide
boss.victory_condition: Seal the Leviathan inside the blast containment chamber after depleting its health

output.objective: Purge the facility of the eldritch infection and restart the evacuation beacon
output.reward: The Eternal Ember Staff is upgraded to 'Infernal Sun' tier

encounters.hazard: Shattered glass on the floor making noise

pickup.name: UV Flashlight
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden blood trails and spiritual weak points

encounters.trigger: Defeating the patient unlocks the door to the Medical Wing

encounters.hazard: Flickering lights that disorient the player

pickup.name: Cursed Medkit
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health but emits a low humming sound

encounters.trigger: Searching the nurse's corpse reveals a key to the Surgical Theater

encounters.hazard: Pools of sludge that slow movement

pickup.name: Silver Chisel
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with the ancient seal blocking the boss room

encounters.trigger: Using the chisel breaks the seal, summoning the boss

boss.name: The Architect of Torment
boss.victory_condition: Parry an attack with the Silver Chisel to expose the heart

output.setting: An abandoned, mist-shrouded whaling station on a frozen, dead planet

encounters.hazard: Freezing black water causing rapid hypothermia

pickup.name: Ignition Flare
pickup.effect: Creates a localized heat zone that blinds light-sensitive entities

encounters.trigger: Killing the Wraith reveals a keycard stuck in the frozen machinery leading to the Processing Plant

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage wires dangling from the ceiling

pickup.name: Void-Glass Lens
pickup.effect: Allows vision into the ethereal spectrum to spot invisible weaknesses

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Amalgam causes a containment breach that forces entry into the Sub-Level Vault

encounters.hazard: Rapidly shifting gravity fields that disorient movement

pickup.name: Corrupted Core
pickup.effect: An unstable energy source required to power the ancient seal

encounters.trigger: Subduing the Stalker unlocks the heavy blast doors leading to the Central Reactor

boss.name: The Celestial Harbinger
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Corrupted Core into the boss's exposed chest cavity to overload its dimensional tether

output.objective: Seal the dimensional rift before the cosmic entity fully materializes
output.reward: The ability to traverse between dimensions at will

output.setting: An abandoned, mist-shrouded cemetery surrounding a derelict mausoleum.

encounters.hazard: Thick, blinding fog that obscures movement.

pickup.name: Ectoplasmic Lantern
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible pathways and weak points.

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate reveals the path to the central monument.

pickup.name: Vial of Ancient Oil
pickup.effect: Highly flammable substance used to consecrate altars.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Ghoul unlocks the entrance to the inner tomb.

encounters.hazard: Crushing stone walls that slowly close inward.

pickup.name: Sacred Silver Key
pickup.effect: Opens the inner sanctum of the Mausoleum Lord.

encounters.trigger: Taking the key causes the ceiling to collapse, revealing the boss chamber.

boss.name: Mausoleum Lord
boss.weakness: Sacred Silver Key used on his pendant
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sacred Silver Key to break his protection barrier then land a final blow.

output.objective: Exorcise the Mausoleum Lord to silence the haunting of the valley.
output.reward: The ability to raise fallen enemies as temporary minions.

output.setting: A decaying, shifting meat-processing plant suspended in a void dimension

enemy.name: Fleshing Drone
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from the Rusty Chain-Cleaver

encounters.hazard: Exposed steam vents that deal damage every turn

pickup.name: Adrenaline Injector
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and damage for one turn

encounters.trigger: Killing the drone causes the floor to collapse into the Processing Vat

encounters.hazard: Pools of corrosive bile that reduce movement speed

pickup.name: Heavy Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving entities and renders them vulnerable

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Abomination unlocks the pressurized seal to the Core

encounters.hazard: Temporal glitches that reset player position randomly

pickup.name: Void Key
pickup.effect: Used to stabilize the boss's phasing armor

encounters.trigger: Securing the Void Key triggers the ritual summoning the boss

boss.name: Primeval Slaughter-God
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while the Void Key is active

output.objective: Escape the meat plant by dismantling the Slaughter-God

output.setting: an endless, fog-drenched conservatory at midnight, quiet and eerily still

pickup.name: blessed watering can
pickup.effect: restores 20 health and can purify corrupted water sources

encounters.trigger: the wailing vine dissipates, revealing a path leading to the reflection pool

pickup.name: silver pruning shears
pickup.effect: increases weapon damage by 10 and cuts through spirit-touched barriers

encounters.trigger: the pool water turns clear, unlocking the iron gate to the central greenhouse

pickup.name: sunlight prism
pickup.effect: magnifies light output, essential for the final confrontation

encounters.trigger: the knight collapses into petals, shattering the seal on the boss chamber

boss.name: the eternal gardener
boss.victory_condition: stun the boss with the sunlight prism to expose its heart, then strike with the spectral lantern

output.objective: restore order to the corrupted sanctuary before dawn breaks
output.reward: the gardener's key, granting access to the sanctuary archives

output.setting: A crumbling, gravity-defying puppet theater suspended in the void

enemy.name: Button-Eyed Teddy
enemy.weakness: Refracted light from Crystalline Prism Staff

encounters.hazard: Floating floorboards that turn into giant teeth if stepped on

pickup.name: Sparkling Glitter Vial
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds enemies with pure delight

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Teddy unlocks the heavy velvet curtains to the Gallery of Giggles

encounters.hazard: Confetti that explodes into tiny, stinging papercuts

pickup.name: Enchanted Music Box Key
pickup.effect: Forces mechanical entities to dance instead of attack

encounters.trigger: Silencing the Jack-in-the-Box reveals the path to the Stage of Sorrows

encounters.hazard: Tears that create slippery, bottomless pools of ink

pickup.name: Polished Silver Mirror
pickup.effect: Reflects the true nature of illusions

encounters.trigger: Calming the Doll grants access to the Grand Finale Boss Stage

boss.name: The Puppeteer of Nightmares
boss.victory_condition: Use the mirror to shatter his control over reality

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen star from the Puppeteer's collection
output.reward: The ability to cast permanent phantasms

output.setting: A collapsing, soot-filled gear-works factory in the sky city of Aethelgard

pickup.name: Lubricant Canister
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables enemy movement when thrown

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard triggers the pressure vents to cease, allowing access to the Ventilation Shaft

pickup.name: High-Voltage Coil
pickup.effect: Doubles damage against clockwork constructs

encounters.trigger: Killing the rat causes the gears powering the blades to jam, opening the path to the Furnace Room

pickup.name: Master Key-Gear
pickup.effect: Unlocks the Boss Chamber door and destabilizes the boss's core

encounters.trigger: Extinguishing the construct releases the pressure lock on the Boss Chamber

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaker's Servitor
boss.victory_condition: Use the Master Key-Gear to expose the core and deliver a final strike with the Brass Wrench

output.objective: Sabotage the main engine core before the factory plummets from the sky
output.reward: The Golden Gear Schematic and 500 Scrap Metal

output.setting: The derelict Aether-Clockwork Observatory floating above a smog-choked city

pickup.name: Conductive Aether-Rod
pickup.effect: Increases Tesla Gauntlet damage by 50% and allows chaining to adjacent enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the heavy cog-locked blast doors to the Central Hub

enemy.name: Brass Scavenger Automaton
enemy.weakness: Chain reaction caused by the Conductive Aether-Rod

pickup.name: Corrosive Oil Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves rust-hardened armor plating

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Hub activates the elevator to the Observation Deck

enemy.name: Steam-Powered Knight
enemy.weakness: Corrosive Oil Vial weakens its steam-pressure armor joints

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling ceiling

pickup.name: Clockwork Heart Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the Boss's unstable power output when interacted with

encounters.trigger: Victory forces the Knight into the ventilation shaft, unlocking the final vault

boss.name: The Grand Clockmaster
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss mechanism by inserting the Clockwork Heart Core into his primary valve

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen Aether-Compass from the Grand Clockmaster before the Observatory crashes
output.reward: The Aether-Compass and the Schematic for the Infinite Gear

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone stabilizes the area for the final confrontation

boss.name: Grand Overseer Clockwork
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the boss using the crystal and strike its core with the Chronostaff

normalized.objective: Restore the flow of time to the city by defeating the Grand Overseer

enemy.name: Steam-Leak Automaton
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from Crystalline Seismic Gauntlet

pickup.name: Obsidian Gear Fragment
pickup.effect: Allows the creation of magnetic resonance shields

encounters.trigger: Debris clearance reveals a locked boiler door leading to the Engine Room

enemy.name: Clockwork Scavenger
enemy.weakness: Magnetic interference from the Obsidian Gear Fragment

encounters.hazard: Unstable grinding gears on the floor

pickup.name: Conductive Ley-Line Battery
pickup.effect: Supercharges geological attacks to shatter brass armor

encounters.trigger: The Scavenger's death drops a rusted key activating the cargo lift

pickup.name: Ancient Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Weakens the structural integrity of the final boss's armor

encounters.trigger: The lift ascends to the CEO's office, activating the containment field for the boss

boss.name: Baron Cogsworth the Unyielding
boss.weakness: Structural collapse caused by the Ancient Core Fragment
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while managing the structural collapse debuff

output.objective: Retrieve the stolen Aether Heart to stabilize the city's power grid
output.reward: Master Geomancer's Stone Tablet and 5000 Aether Shards

output.setting: A quiet, brass-fitted clockwork garden suspended in the clouds

pickup.name: Coolant Vial
pickup.effect: Reduces temperature of heated metal surfaces

encounters.trigger: Defeating the automaton opens the gate to the Foggy Conservatory

enemy.name: Fog-Veiled Sprite
enemy.weakness: The Coolant Vial creates a chill that binds the spirit

pickup.name: Brass Key-Crank
pickup.effect: Used to wind the main clockwork spring

encounters.trigger: Using the Coolant Vial reveals the path to the Clockwork Heart

enemy.name: Steam-Pressure Construct
enemy.weakness: The Brass Key-Crank stops its internal rotating gears

pickup.name: Chronos Core
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal disturbances

encounters.trigger: Stopping the construct engages the final gear sequence to activate the boss

boss.name: The Celestial Timekeeper
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Core to freeze the Timekeeper in place for a final strike

output.objective: Restore harmony to the floating gardens by winding the main clockwork spring
output.reward: The Eternal Pendulum, a relic that grants inner peace
